Popups for Bluetooth HRM, notifications, timeline, alarm, Bluetooth pairing, crashes, health tracking, phone, worker switching, and wakeup events in Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[ble_hrm](ble_hrm/README.md)**: Popups for Bluetooth heart rate monitor sharing, reminders, and stopping actions with user interactions.
- **[notifications](notifications/README.md)**: Manages notification windows and lists, including display, interaction, and lifecycle functions.
- **[timeline](timeline/README.md)**: Timeline peek functionality, animations, and item layer management for Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[alarm_popup.c](alarm_popup.c.md)**: Implements an alarm popup with snooze and dismiss options, including vibration and UI management.
- **[alarm_popup.h](alarm_popup.h.md)**: Declares a function to display an alarm popup window for a Pebble alarm clock event.
- **[bluetooth_pairing_ui.c](bluetooth_pairing_ui.c.md)**: Implements the Bluetooth pairing user interface for Pebble firmware, handling user confirmation and pairing completion events.
- **[bluetooth_pairing_ui.h](bluetooth_pairing_ui.h.md)**: Handles Bluetooth pairing events in the Pebble firmware.
- **[crashed_ui.c](crashed_ui.c.md)**: Implements UI dialogs for handling worker crashes and system reset alerts in the Pebble firmware.
- **[crashed_ui.h](crashed_ui.h.md)**: Functions to display modals for Pebble reset, Bluetooth issues, and worker crashes.
- **[health_tracking_ui.c](health_tracking_ui.c.md)**: Implements UI for health tracking notifications and dialogs in Pebble firmware.
- **[health_tracking_ui.h](health_tracking_ui.h.md)**: Functions for displaying health tracking UI messages and registering app launches.
- **[phone_formatting.c](phone_formatting.c.md)**: Functions for formatting caller names and phone numbers in the Pebble firmware.
- **[phone_formatting.h](phone_formatting.h.md)**: Functions for formatting caller names and international phone numbers.
- **[phone_ui.c](phone_ui.c.md)**: Implements the phone user interface for handling incoming, outgoing, and missed calls on Pebble devices.
- **[phone_ui.h](phone_ui.h.md)**: Functions for handling phone call UI events in the Pebble firmware.
- **[switch_worker_ui.c](switch_worker_ui.c.md)**: Manages UI for switching background worker applications with confirmation dialogs.
- **[switch_worker_ui.h](switch_worker_ui.h.md)**: Function declaration for confirming a worker switch with options for default setting and callback handling.
- **[wakeup_ui.c](wakeup_ui.c.md)**: Implements a UI popup for displaying missed wakeup events on a Pebble device.
- **[wakeup_ui.h](wakeup_ui.h.md)**: Creates a popup window to display missed wakeup events and corresponding application names.
